# Orbit typography

Two families: a workhorse sans (Inter) for UI and a brand face (Sofia Pro) for
display moments. Sizes, weights, and line-heights are tokenised; composite text
styles bundle them per role.

## Font families

| Token | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `--orbit-font-family-sans` | "Inter", sans-serif |
| `--orbit-font-family-brand` | "Sofia Pro", sans-serif |

## Sizes

| Token | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `--orbit-text-xs` | 12px |
| `--orbit-text-sm` | 14px |
| `--orbit-text-base` | 16px |
| `--orbit-text-lg` | 20px |
| `--orbit-text-xl` | 26px |
| `--orbit-text-2xl` | 28px |
| `--orbit-text-3xl` | 36px |

## Weights

| Token | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `--orbit-font-weight-regular` | 400 |
| `--orbit-font-weight-medium` | 500 |
| `--orbit-font-weight-semibold` | 600 |
| `--orbit-font-weight-bold` | 800 |

## Line heights

| Token | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `--orbit-leading-tight` | 1 |
| `--orbit-leading-snug` | 1.143 |
| `--orbit-leading-normal` | 1.571 |
| `--orbit-leading-relaxed` | 1.714 |
